flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Hannibal-LaGrange University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (381 vs 556).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hannibal-LaGrange University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (31.9% → 22.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hannibal-LaGrange University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (543 → 410).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hannibal-LaGrange University rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.7k → $15.5k).
